ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fuelbeds" (
  "fuelbed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuelbed */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Area of the fuelbed */,
  "fm_duff" REAL /* Duff moisture */,
  "fm_1000hr" REAL /* 1000-hour fuel moisture */,
  "can_con_pct" REAL /* Canopy cover percentage */,
  "shrub_black_pct" REAL /* Shrub black percentage */,
  "pile_black_pct" REAL /* Pile black percentage */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement (e.g., tons, acres) */,
  "ecoregion" TEXT /* Ecoregion where the fuelbed is located */,
  "fm_litter" REAL /* Litter moisture */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season when the data was collected */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel (e.g., grass, shrub, timber) */,
  "topography_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topography of the area */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the fuelbed record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the fuelbed record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuelbed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuelbeds_ecoregion FOREIGN KEY ("ecoregion") REFERENCES ecoregions ("ecoregion_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuelbeds_topography_id FOREIGN KEY ("topography_id") REFERENCES topography ("topography_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ecoregions" (
  "ecoregion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ecoregion */,
  "ecoregion_name" TEXT /* Name of the ecoregion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ecoregion */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the ecoregion */,
  "vegetation_type" TEXT /* Dominant vegetation type in the ecoregion */,
  "topography_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the typical topography of the ecoregion */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the ecoregion record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the ecoregion record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ecoregion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ecoregions_topography_id FOREIGN KEY ("topography_id") REFERENCES topography ("topography_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vegetation" (
  "vegetation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vegetation entry */,
  "fuelbed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fuelbed where the vegetation is located */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the vegetation */,
  "percentage_cover" REAL /* Percentage cover of the vegetation */,
  "vegetation_type" TEXT /* Type of vegetation (e.g., grass, shrub, tree) */,
  "height" REAL /* Average height of the vegetation */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the vegetation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the vegetation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the vegetation record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vegetation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vegetation_fuelbed_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuelbed_id") REFERENCES fuelbeds ("fuelbed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "fuelbed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fuelbed near the weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the weather station record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the weather station record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_stations_fuelbed_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuelbed_id") REFERENCES fuelbeds ("fuelbed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the wind */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the weather data was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the weather data record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fire_behavior" (
  "fire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fire behavior prediction */,
  "fuelbed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fuelbed where the fire is predicted */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data used for prediction */,
  "predicted_fire_behavior" TEXT /* Predicted fire behavior */,
  "fire_intensity" TEXT /* Intensity of the fire */,
  "spread_rate" TEXT /* Rate at which the fire is spreading */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the fire behavior prediction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the fire behavior prediction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fire_behavior_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fire_behavior_fuelbed_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuelbed_id") REFERENCES fuelbeds ("fuelbed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, firefighter) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topography" (
  "topography_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topography entry */,
  "slope" REAL /* Slope of the area */,
  "aspect" TEXT /* Aspect of the area (direction the slope faces) */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the area */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the topography record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the topography record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topography_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictive_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each predictive model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the predictive model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fire_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fire incident */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the fire started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the fire ended */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the fire */,
  "fuelbed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fuelbed where the fire occurred */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the incident record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the incident record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fire_incidents_fuelbed_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuelbed_id") REFERENCES fuelbeds ("fuelbed_id")
)
